title: This may not matter but
wikitext:
[]: This may not matter, but...*SPOILERS* Post by CyberXIII » Thu Sep 17, 2009 1:47 pm How the hell did they clean up after Sahaquiel died? That was a tidal wave of Angel blood that flooded half the countryside.

[]: Post by Dartz » Thu Sep 17, 2009 1:53 pm Err.... They Did!.... end of story. Author Fiat I guess. Then again, I prefer Alfa Romeo.

[]: Post by R-U-4-Zeruel » Thu Sep 17, 2009 3:21 pm mmm.. Cool aid

[]: Post by UltraBlackPilot » Thu Sep 17, 2009 4:04 pm After all the blood from Sachiel, shamshel, and Ramiel, they got smart and installed an Automatic Angel Blood Disintegrative Field during the gap between movies on all surfaces, thus cleaning blood is as simple as flipping 1 switch on the control unit. Does wonders on stains.

[]: Post by trueno_twentyone » Thu Sep 17, 2009 6:17 pm They use lots and lots of detergent!

[]: Re: This may not matter, but...*SPOILERS* Post by Joseph the PRPD » Thu Sep 17, 2009 7:13 pm CyberXIII wrote: How the hell did they clean up after Sahaquiel died? That was a tidal wave of Angel blood that flooded half the countryside.

[]: Post by Alaska Slim » Thu Sep 17, 2009 7:45 pm Anyone else besides me have this going through your head at the time? And it's obvious where all the blood went, EVAPORATION!... and probably pumped into the ocean.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Sep 18, 2009 12:57 am Well dem Evas sure ran far. I figure NERV has a whole "Angel Extraction Unit" or something. A poor group of refugees from some country that was destroyed in Second Impact who live in subpar housing (probably hiding out in Rei's apartment complex) and make it their duty to clean up Angel's without making a fuss.

[]: Post by master_lloyd » Fri Sep 18, 2009 5:44 am A bit of Alkaseltzer, a dab of lemon juice, and a good glug of white wine vinegar should get any stain out.

[]: Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Sep 18, 2009 5:55 am Reason #3: They summoned a Bloodthirster to help combat the angels (man, if the imagery didn't seem biblical before ), still, it would of probably died before the next attack, what a waste of perfectly good angel blood, I mean, don't they realize ...

[]: Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Sep 18, 2009 11:37 am They push it out of the way and into the oceans with the Eva's AT Fields. That shit can act like brooms.

[]: Post by Namikiri » Fri Sep 18, 2009 1:51 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZTpXh33Mbeg Just a suggestion,Gendou. Operators are standing by...

[]: Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Sep 18, 2009 2:14 pm Namikiri wrote: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZTpXh33Mbeg Just a suggestion,Gendou. Operators are standing by...

[]: Post by NemZ » Fri Sep 18, 2009 6:22 pm the horror...

[]: Post by R-U-4-Zeruel » Fri Sep 18, 2009 6:30 pm Namikiri wrote: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZTpXh33Mbeg Just a suggestion,Gendou. Operators are standing by...

[]: Post by Xard » Fri Sep 18, 2009 7:46 pm Sammaeloo wrote: Namikiri wrote: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ZTpXh33Mbeg Just a suggestion,Gendou. Operators are standing by...

[]: Post by Namikiri » Fri Sep 18, 2009 7:59 pm I don't get it...whose face is that pasted on top of Shamshel?

[]: Post by brainissues » Fri Sep 18, 2009 8:59 pm Dartz wrote: Err.... They Did!.... end of story. Author Fiat I guess. Then again, I prefer Alfa Romeo.

[]: Post by UltraBlackPilot » Fri Sep 18, 2009 9:41 pm brainissues are you spamming?
